catalysts.title: Stocks dramatically pare losses after Trump offers Gulf shipping safety; oil retreats from highs: Live updates - CNBC
catalysts.description: Traders watched rising geopolitical tensions and worried the U.S.-Iran conflict could go on longer than anticipated.

catalysts.title: What another sales decline for Target says about consumers - Star Tribune
catalysts.description: Target’s comparable sales fell 2.5% and profits more than 5%, while competitors saw gains and Best Buy had a steady holiday quarter.

catalysts.title: Justice Department lawyer says concert ticket industry is broken because of Ticketmaster - AP News
catalysts.description: A Justice Department lawyer has told a New York jury at the start of an antitrust trial that the concert ticket industry is broken because Ticketmaster and its parent company Live Nation Entertainment

catalysts.title: Paramount Skydance Debt Downgraded to Junk Status by Fitch Ratings Following Warner Bros. Discovery Deal - Variety
catalysts.description: Fitch Ratings downgraded Paramount Skydance's credit rating and debt to junk status in the wake of the deal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery.

catalysts.title: Quantum firms set up across Chicago ahead of South Works campus - Crain's Chicago Business
catalysts.description: Companies slated for the Illinois Quantum & Microelectronics Park are opening labs at mHUB, Hyde Park Labs and downtown while the South Works campus is built.

catalysts.title: Amazon says drones hit 3 of its Middle East data centers amid Iran conflict - CBS News
catalysts.description: Drones struck two facilities in the United Arab Emirates directly, and damaged a data center in Bahrain, Amazon said.

catalysts.title: Anthropic’s Claude is suddenly the most popular iPhone app following Pentagon feud - CNN
catalysts.description: The AI company Anthropic was likely not in the public lexicon just a month ago. But it is now after a whirlwind sequence of events in February thrust the company into the public eye more than ever.

catalysts.title: Global Bonds on Knife-Edge as Iran War Revives Inflation Threat - Bloomberg.com
catalysts.description: The US-Israeli war on Iran is rekindling inflation concerns across financial markets, sapping the outlook for global bonds that had just posted their best start to a year since the pandemic.

catalysts.title: Accenture to Acquire Ookla to Strengthen Network Intelligence and Experience with Data and AI For Enterprises - Accenture
catalysts.description: Accenture has entered into an agreement to acquire Ookla, a global leader in network intelligence, competitive benchmarking and customer experience analytics.

catalysts.title: The candy heir vs. chocolate skimpflation : Planet Money - NPR
catalysts.description: The grandson of the Reese's Peanut Butter Cups creator has launched a campaign against The Hershey Company, which owns the Reese's brand. He wants them to stop skimping on ingredients.

catalysts.title: Iran attacks threaten US economy with more uncertainty around inflation, growth - AP News
catalysts.description: Oil prices jumped Tuesday for the second straight day and gas prices moved higher in the United States, underscoring the threat of rising inflation posed by the Iran war. Coming after nearly five year

catalysts.title: GW sold Virginia campus for $427 million to Amazon for data center development - The GW Hatchet
catalysts.description: The deal transfers all of GW’s roughly 122 acres of property in Loudoun County, Virginia, to ADS for $427,299,350 — roughly $3.5 million an acre — according to real estate records.

catalysts.title: US LNG producers rush to seize on surging gas prices triggered by Iran conflict - Financial Times
catalysts.description: Venture Global and Cheniere Energy look to bring on extra capacity as prices surge in Europe and Asia
